title: TESLA Phase 1 Peptide Immunogenicity Table (Table S4)
description: 608 neopeptides from 8 patients (3 melanoma, 3 NSCLC, 2 additional) with HLA alleles, binding affinity, tumor abundance, agretopicity, foreignness, binding stability, and pMHC-multimer-validated immunogenicity (VALIDATED column). Supplementary Table S4 from Wells et al. Cell 2020.

title: TESLA Phase 2 Peptide Immunogenicity Table (Table S7)
description: 310 neopeptides from 3 additional melanoma patients with HLA alleles, binding affinity, tumor abundance, agretopicity, foreignness, binding stability, and pMHC-multimer-validated immunogenicity (VALIDATED column). Supplementary Table S7 from Wells et al. Cell 2020.
